CreateClassicRolloverOpportunityFundAccountWorkflow: Navigate to Opportunities via Classic tab

CreateClassicRolloverOpportunityFundAccountWorkflow: Select record type "Rollover" and click Continue

CreateClassicRolloverOpportunityFundAccountWorkflow: Verify Classic Opportunity detail page is displayed
Verify Opportunity detail page and extract record ID
